reasoning: Rule A applies: wrong tool called (get_japan_heritage instead of search_area or wikidata_heritage for pilgrimage routes), but the response's own tool_scope_note explicitly confirms this mismatch and the browse_advisory redirects to search_area(q='山岳信仰') and search_area(q='修験道') which are correct. Single root cause (wrong tool / retrieval failure) per Rule B: intent and specificity take the hit; other dims scored on actual data quality.
